transfer.workflow.s3inputfilelocation.Cf: Specifies the details for the Amazon S3 location for an input file to a workflow.

transfer.workflow.s3inputfilelocation.Bu.Description: Specifies the S3 bucket for the customer input file.

transfer.workflow.s3inputfilelocation.Ke.Description: The name assigned to the file when it was created in Amazon S3. You use the object key to retrieve the object.
